_doc: PvP equipment normalization caps per mode. Anti one-shot + tactical scaling. CMD2 Phase 11 Mục IX + Batch 5.4 A1.b config update.
_dna_lock: TS Online PvP — tactical, KHÔNG stat explosion. Companion vẫn meaningful nhưng cap nặng hơn.
_a1b_note: hp_floor activation rules: arena/battleground → cap_per_hit đủ chặt → hp_floor=0 (cap-only guard). open_pvp → cap 90% + floor 15% → max effective damage 85% (floor TRIGGERS khi raw > 85%). Verified Batch 5.4 test.

arena_1v1._doc: Solo arena — strictest cap, no proc abuse. hp_floor=0 (cap 40% đã đủ anti-one-shot).

arena_3v3._doc: Group arena — slight loosening, team comp matters. hp_floor=0 (cap 50% guard).

battleground._doc: Large battleground 5v5+ — looser, tank meaningful. hp_floor=0 (cap 60% guard).

open_pvp._doc: World open PvP — high cap 90% + hp_floor 15% (Batch 5.4 A1.b activation). Risk = reward NHƯNG floor đảm bảo còn ≥ 15% HP sau bất kỳ hit nào.

companion_pvp_ratio_bp._doc: Companion stat scaling trong PvP — yếu hơn PvE để tránh 2v1 trá hình.

proc_normalization_rules._doc: Proc effect normalization rules per mode.
